HomePage.title: Papirus
HomePage.subtitle: Hello — Bootstrap and localisation are working.

hero.title: Turn PDFs and images into EPUB
hero.subtitle: Upload a PDF or a set of screenshots. We run optical reading and structure the content into a clean, readable EPUB file.

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Drop a PDF or images (PNG, JPG, WebP) into the upload zone.

step2.title: Pay
step2.desc: See the page count, enter your email, and pay securely via Stripe.

step3.title: Receive
step3.desc: We convert your file to EPUB and send it straight to your email.

upload.heading: Upload your file
upload.dropPrompt: Drag & drop a PDF or images here

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.paymentNote: Payment via Stripe after processing. No account required.

billing.heading: Billing
billing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmation.heading: All done
confirmation.body: Payment received. Processing has started. You'll receive your EPUB at {email} shortly.
